narrative:
Jackson (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,311 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.4 percentage points.
